name: C-16 legacy mode scaffolds a source-folder file under <tree>/<jurisdiction-ns>/<id>.yaml per the G-9 chain
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://x.gov/regs --id custom-reg --tree out --jurisdiction 'US Federal' && [ -s out/us-government/custom-reg.yaml ] && grep -q 'jurisdiction: "US Federal"' out/us-government/custom-reg.yaml && echo scaffolded 1>&2
